gen_strategy_note: Per-frame ERNIE calls. No character-identity constraint, so parallel pipelines help linearly.

impact_burst.color_palette: white-hot core with yellow and orange falloff
poses: starting radial burst at 10% diameter, bright white core, thin shell
expanding burst at 30% diameter, white-yellow core, orange shell
peak radial at 60% diameter, full brightness, visible debris particles
post-peak at 80% diameter, yellow shell fading to orange edge
fading halo at 100% diameter, orange tint, 50% opacity
final wisp at 120% diameter, 10% opacity, nearly gone
thin starting ring at 20% diameter, bright cyan-white
expanding ring at 50% diameter, white edge, cyan interior void
large ring at 80% diameter, edge thinner, ring translucent
very large ring at 110% diameter, edge faint, mostly transparent
final ring at 130% diameter, barely visible outline
thin trailing streak, horizontal, left-tapered, 80% length
trailing streak with slight variation, wispy turbulence
trailing streak pulse wave, brighter core
trailing streak damped, fading edges

hit_flash.color_palette: pure white with pale yellow edge
poses: small white flash at point of impact, star-shape, 30% diameter
larger star-shape flash at 60% diameter, core still white
fading flash at 80% diameter, pale yellow, 40% opacity

slash_diagonal.color_palette: silvery white with blue cold edge
poses: start of slash, diagonal top-right to bottom-left, thin arc entering frame
slash mid-arc, 60% length, sharp edge visible, white core
full diagonal slash spanning frame, maximum length, bright
post-slash trail, 80% length, edge softer, 70% opacity
final wisp of slash, 50% length, 30% opacity

explosion.color_palette: orange-yellow core with red-brown smoke tail
poses: initial ignition flash, small bright yellow core at 15% diameter
rapid expansion, 40% diameter, yellow-orange with debris
peak fireball at 70% diameter, white-yellow core, orange shell
fireball expanding further at 85% diameter, orange-red shell, smoke starting at edges
fireball peaking at 100% diameter, mostly orange-red, heavy smoke halo
fireball beginning to fade, orange interior dimming, smoke dominant
smoke dominant at 100% diameter, black-gray smoke with orange underglow
smoke rising, thinner at bottom, 90% diameter, dark brown-gray
smoke dispersing, 80% diameter, lighter gray, 50% opacity
final wisps, 70% diameter, near-transparent gray smoke
small compact puff, 20% diameter, bright gray
expanding puff, 40% diameter, turbulent edges
peak puff at 60% diameter, gray-white, soft edges
puff dispersing, 75% diameter, 60% opacity, wispy edges
final wisp, 90% diameter, nearly transparent

sparkle_twinkle.color_palette: white core with rainbow chromatic aberration
poses: tiny point of light, 10% diameter, single bright pixel
small star shape with 4-point rays, 20% diameter, white core
medium star with 8-point rays, 40% diameter, rainbow edges
peak star with 12-point rays, 60% diameter, full chromatic
medium star returning, 40% diameter, rays shorter
small star fading, 25% diameter, dim rays
faint pre-discharge glow, vertical line, 50% opacity
full bolt with branching forks, vertical zigzag, maximum brightness, 90% height
bolt still visible with reduced branching, 75% brightness
afterglow, ghost of the bolt, 40% brightness, 80% height

freeze_ice.color_palette: pale cyan with white crystalline highlights
poses: initial frost dusting, small crystal specks forming in center
crystals growing outward, radial ice pattern at 40% diameter
peak frost with sharp crystal spikes, 70% diameter, brittle look
crystal shell complete at 100% diameter, geometric facets visible
crystals beginning to crack, 100% diameter, interior darkening

burn_fire_loop.color_palette: orange-red fire with yellow core and dark smoke top
poses: fire flame phase 1, base wide, tips low, yellow core
fire flame phase 2, tips rising, swirling right
fire flame phase 3, peak height, tips split
fire flame phase 4, tips crossing back left
fire flame phase 5, base widening slightly, tips falling
fire flame phase 6, tips low again, swirling center
fire flame phase 7, tips rising left side
fire flame phase 8, tips peaking, mirror of phase 3

heal_pulse.color_palette: emerald green with soft gold highlights
poses: small green orb at center, 20% diameter, gentle glow
orb expanding, 40% diameter, soft halo, gold highlights
orb at 60% diameter with rising sparkles
peak orb at 80% diameter, cross or plus-shape visible in center
orb fading at 90% diameter, halo dominant
final halo at 100% diameter, 40% opacity, green-gold wash

poison_cloud.color_palette: sickly yellow-green with darker brown edges
poses: low wispy cloud, 40% diameter, thin
cloud thickening, 55% diameter, turbulent
cloud peak, 70% diameter, denser center
cloud drifting, 70% diameter, offset left
cloud dispersing, 60% diameter, translucent
cloud reforming, 45% diameter, returning to baseline

bleed_drops.color_palette: deep crimson with dark red shadows
poses: single drop forming at top, thin streak down
drop detaching, falling, second drop forming above
two drops mid-fall, first nearing bottom
drops impacting, small splatter pattern at base

confusion_swirl.color_palette: purple with pink highlights and white stars
poses: swirl phase 1, spiral starting small, counter-clockwise
swirl phase 2, spiral expanding, stars appearing on arm
swirl phase 3, full spiral, multiple stars orbiting
swirl phase 4, spiral tightening, stars clustered
swirl phase 5, spiral offset to new position
swirl phase 6, spiral reforming original size, ready to loop

charm_hearts.color_palette: pink and red with sparkle accents
poses: single small heart rising from bottom, 15% size
two hearts at different heights, 20% size
three hearts scattered, one sparkling
four hearts peak height, pulse brightness
hearts fading as they rise higher
hearts nearly gone at top, new hearts forming at bottom
single Z character rising from bottom, small, slight tilt
two Z characters at different heights, larger
three Z characters cascading, largest at top
Zs fading at top of frame, new Z forming at bottom
three stars orbiting at top of frame, positions 0/120/240 degrees
three stars orbited 90 degrees clockwise
three stars orbited another 90 degrees
three stars orbited 270 degrees total, ready to loop

death_spiral.color_palette: dark purple to black with occasional ghostly highlights
poses: small dark swirl forming at ground, 30% diameter
swirl growing, 45% diameter, purple-black
swirl with rising particles, 60% diameter
peak swirl, 75% diameter, ghostly wisps escaping top
swirl narrowing as it rises, 60% diameter, center higher
swirl thinning, 50% diameter, center at midframe
swirl narrow at top, 35% diameter, dissipating
final wisp at top, 25% diameter, 30% opacity

shockwave_dust.color_palette: dusty brown-gray with lighter tan highlights
poses: dust ring forming at ground, 40% diameter, wider than tall
dust ring expanding, 60% diameter, rising slightly
dust ring peak, 80% diameter, turbulent
dust dispersing, 100% diameter, wispy edges, 50% opacity

ernie_call_count.note: sum of frames across all 20 VFX. At ~9s/Turbo call on single pipeline = ~17.5 min wall-clock; ~6 min with 3-way parallelism.
